## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content strategy for technical guides, integration pages, and SEO-focused articles for Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/69zEsgXfTBWt7jSFJQag1FgbJD-V8v-2?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Need to carefully position Webflow in headless CMS content; avoid inaccurate claims](https://fathom.video/share/69zEsgXfTBWt7jSFJQag1FgbJD-V8v-2?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Integration page reviews pending; team to address this week](https://fathom.video/share/69zEsgXfTBWt7jSFJQag1FgbJD-V8v-2?tab=summary&timestamp=843.0)
  - [New approach for technical guides introduced; needs refinement for Stripe/membership example](https://fathom.video/share/69zEsgXfTBWt7jSFJQag1FgbJD-V8v-2?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
  - [SEO articles require stakeholder input, especially for competitive topics](https://fathom.video/share/69zEsgXfTBWt7jSFJQag1FgbJD-V8v-2?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)

## Topics

### Headless CMS Content Strategy

  - [Webflow positioned as a "hybrid CMS" rather than purely headless](https://fathom.video/share/69zEsgXfTBWt7jSFJQag1FgbJD-V8v-2?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
  - [Caution needed when comparing to dedicated headless CMS solutions (e.g., Next.js integrations)](https://fathom.video/share/69zEsgXfTBWt7jSFJQag1FgbJD-V8v-2?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [Joe (manager) leading headless CMS positioning and go-to-market strategy](https://fathom.video/share/69zEsgXfTBWt7jSFJQag1FgbJD-V8v-2?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Need to align content with current product capabilities and positioning](https://fathom.video/share/69zEsgXfTBWt7jSFJQag1FgbJD-V8v-2?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)

### Integration Pages

  - [5 high-priority integration pages awaiting review](https://fathom.video/share/69zEsgXfTBWt7jSFJQag1FgbJD-V8v-2?tab=summary&timestamp=843.0)
  - [Team now has access to the CMS project for updates](https://fathom.video/share/69zEsgXfTBWt7jSFJQag1FgbJD-V8v-2?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)
  - [Colin to ping relevant team members for reviews](https://fathom.video/share/69zEsgXfTBWt7jSFJQag1FgbJD-V8v-2?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)

### Technical Guides Approach

  - [New cluster of technical guides for use cases highlighted in integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/69zEsgXfTBWt7jSFJQag1FgbJD-V8v-2?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
  - [First example: gated membership site with Stripe integration](https://fathom.video/share/69zEsgXfTBWt7jSFJQag1FgbJD-V8v-2?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
  - [Discussion on level of detail and opinion in guides](https://fathom.video/share/69zEsgXfTBWt7jSFJQag1FgbJD-V8v-2?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [Suggestion to include both custom solutions and app-based approaches (e.g., Outseta, MemberStack)](https://fathom.video/share/69zEsgXfTBWt7jSFJQag1FgbJD-V8v-2?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)

### SEO Article Strategy

  - ["What is Composable Commerce" article deemed less controversial](https://fathom.video/share/69zEsgXfTBWt7jSFJQag1FgbJD-V8v-2?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [Listicles and comparison articles need careful positioning of Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/69zEsgXfTBWt7jSFJQag1FgbJD-V8v-2?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [Developer-focused content requires extra scrutiny (e.g., framework-specific claims)](https://fathom.video/share/69zEsgXfTBWt7jSFJQag1FgbJD-V8v-2?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [Some topics may need input from product marketing (e.g., Joe for CMS comparisons)](https://fathom.video/share/69zEsgXfTBWt7jSFJQag1FgbJD-V8v-2?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to map out acceptable topics for listicles/comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/69zEsgXfTBWt7jSFJQag1FgbJD-V8v-2?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [Luke to follow up with Joe on shareable positioning for headless CMS space](https://fathom.video/share/69zEsgXfTBWt7jSFJQag1FgbJD-V8v-2?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Team to review pending integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/69zEsgXfTBWt7jSFJQag1FgbJD-V8v-2?tab=summary&timestamp=843.0)

    1.  Custom solution (less detailed)
    2.  App-based solution using Outseta or MemberStack
  - [Luke to review "What is Composable Commerce" article](https://fathom.video/share/69zEsgXfTBWt7jSFJQag1FgbJD-V8v-2?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [Continue pushing on integration content while clarifying publication process for other article types](https://fathom.video/share/69zEsgXfTBWt7jSFJQag1FgbJD-V8v-2?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
